title: Clear, honest pricing.
subtitle: Some features are always free. Paid work is priced before we start. You pay recovery fees only if we succeed.

anonymousFree.title: Always free
items: Insurance literacy content in your language

legal: We are an information and document-preparation service. We do not sell insurance. Unlike aggregators, we do not receive commissions from insurers. When you ask us for a recommendation, we link you to the insurer's own site — you transact directly with them.
